title: Batch-create issues with dependency wiring from JSON
description:
Add declarative batch issue creation with dependency wiring from a JSON file (replacing hand-written create+dep loops).

## Success Criteria

- [ ] `jit issue batch-create --from-json <file>` accepts an array of issue defs `{key, title, description?, type?, priority?, labels?, gates?, depends_on?}` with symbolic `key` references.
- [ ] It fully pre-validates (duplicate/unknown keys, unknown depends_on refs, cycle detection, type/label/gate validity) before any write, exiting non-zero listing offending entries on failure.
- [ ] On success it creates all issues and dependency edges and returns a `{key: id}` map.
